Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Archmage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — An Archmage is a level of wizardry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — An Archmage is a human woman who uses large-scale magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The Union strike team contained at least one Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — An Archmage can understand the sharing of Aetheric patterns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — The Archmage is a dark-skinned human man with silver eyes who wears a blue hooded mantle and carries a wand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — The Archmage is a certified Archmage of binding and sealing magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Archmages are Union-certified.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — An Archmage is a level of magic user that can be granted via certification and knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — An Archmage has the ability to bend the rules of magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — An Archmage is a title earned through significant magical feats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Varic Vallenar holds the rank of Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — An Archmage has a profound bond with his staff.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Shyrax possesses a ring containing the ghost of a human Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — An Archmage can perform miracles when prepared and knowing what is coming.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — The Archmage is a legendary necromancer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — The Archmage is a thousand-year-old death mage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — An Archmage is a scholar who explores the Aether.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
